description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests, except for changes to markdown files, and allows manual dispatch. The workflow should run on an Ubuntu 22.04 environment with four concurrent jobs: one for a debug build with coverage, one for a release build with valgrind, one for a release build with sanitizers, and one for a build with all options enabled and documentation. Each job should install dependencies, configure Conan, and then build and test the project with specific settings.
